productDisplayName: Puma Men's Calibre Convertible Spike Shoe
description: A contemporary all round cricket shoe, the puma Calibre Convertible Spike shoe ideally suits players looking for lightweight performance without compromising stability, support and comfort.Upper Lightweight microfibre with breathable mesh panels Perforated toe box for ample ventilation Abrasion resistant toe overlay for longer shoe life Padded heel for traction Integrated lace-wrap stability support system High visibility cosmetics Midsole Compression moulded EVA with idCELL heel unit and ArchTec stability shank for maximum grip and shock absorption Soft EVA innerboard and removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Anatomically positioned spike plate which can be set up with metal spikes or mouldedTPU cleats for optimum traction on all surfaces
